banner.title: Seedream 4.5 AI Image Generator
banner.description: Seedream 4.5 achieves an all-round improvement through the overall scaling of the model. It accurately identifies the main subjects in multi-image editing, strictly preserves the details of the reference images, and further enhances the typography and dense text rendering capabilities, so that it can deliver professional visual creatives with high consistency and fidelity.

tabs.title: Text to Image

tabs.title: Image to Image

tabs.placeholder: Drag and drop images here, or click to select
tabs.tips: Upload up to 14 reference images. We accept JPEG, PNG, GIF, WEBP formats up to 20MB with dimensions up to 4096 x 4096 pixels.

details.title: Consistency with Reference Image
details.description: Preserves the reference image's facial features, lighting, color tone, and other details, delivering professional editing capabilities.

cells.content: Fairy Tale Book Cover: A little girl and a small fox stand in front of a glowing forest cabin. The moon is huge and dreamy, with stardust floating around them; firefly lights illuminate the meadow; small white flowers adorn it delicately; mist creates a soft sense of depth; an ornate bronze fairy-tale border surrounds the entire scene. The color scheme features a contrast between blue-purple and warm gold. The facial features of the characters remain consistent with the original image. The overall style is highly dreamy, gentle, and magical, suitable for a children's picture book cover.

gallery.title: Creativity Unleashed, Explore the Possibilities
gallery.description: Browse our curated showcase to spark your next great idea.

items.prompt: Keep the composition and lighting direction unchanged. Replace the pine bonsai on the right with a minimalist dried branch arrangement (leafless twigs). Crucial: The shadow on the wall must change to match the shape of the dried branches, showing sparse, lonely linear shadows.

Nighttime outdoor photoshoot: A young man stands inside a public phone booth, holding a blue phone receiver to his ear. One hand is casually tucked into his pocket, and he strikes a relaxed posture. He wears a white T-shirt with a pattern, loose brown pants, and a jacket draped over his arm. The booth's glass reflects city streetlights with a bokeh effect, creating a vintage film style.

An extremely visually striking office scene: A professional sits at a workstation cluttered with documents and two additional monitors, while the entire space is densely covered with a vast number of yellow sticky notes—spreading from the walls to the ceiling and scattered across the floor. Each sticky note is filled with handwritten text, as if representing countless pending tasks or pieces of information, with the visual focus guided by the sticky notes converging on the professional's position.
Afternoon side light illuminates the camping tent, with the rough texture of the tent canvas clearly visible. A German Shepherd lies inside; its owner squats down to shake hands with it.
Dynamic Motion Portrait A dynamic long-exposure shot of a person in motion against a vivid red background, creating a fluid and artistic visual effect.
A hand holds four black and white polaroid-style photos of portrait against a blank white background.

C4D-style educational poster design for an academic forum sharing session. The main subject is a translucent glass DNA double helix chain. Diagonal composition: in the lower right corner, the main text is displayed in large dark gray font: "Conference Subject"; below it, in smaller font: "A major breakthrough in genetics: scientists have recently completed the most comprehensive map of human genome variation to date, propelling precision medicine and disease prevention into a new era."

Five shimmering goldfish weave through crevices between stones; four are red-and-white, while one is silver-white. By the pond's edge, a golden shaded British Shorthair cat watches them intently, counting on blind luck. Watercolor style.
Night Market Alley Scene: A bustling night market with bright lights, steaming food stalls, and reflections on the wet road, creating a warm, vibrant, and authentically lively atmosphere.

This is a PPT page: the left side displays three experimental steps for photosynthesis, starting with "Experimental Preparation: 1. Select 2 geranium leaves of similar size; 2. Leaf Treatment; 3. Starch Test", along with detailed explanations for each of these three steps. On the right side, there is a diagram of the experimental apparatus drawn in light green. In the corner of the background, there are a mini light gray iodine bottle and a paperclip.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about Seedream 4.5 AI image generator

items.title: What is Seedream 4.5?
items.description: Seedream 4.5 is ByteDance's advanced AI image generation model, developed by the Doubao team. It offers exceptional image quality, support for up to 14 reference images, native 4K resolution output, and batch generation capabilities, making it one of the most versatile image generation models available.

items.title: What makes Seedream 4.5 unique?
items.description: Seedream 4.5 stands out with its industry-leading support for 14 reference images in image-to-image mode, native 4K resolution generation, batch processing of up to 15 images, excellent Chinese and English text rendering, and competitive pricing. It combines power and accessibility for both creative professionals and hobbyists.

items.title: Is Seedream 4.5 free to use?
items.description: Yes, Seedream 4.5 is free to try on Veo3 AI. New users receive free credits upon registration, allowing you to experience the model's capabilities without any upfront payment.

items.title: What resolutions does Seedream 4.5 support?
items.description: Seedream 4.5 supports three resolution tiers: 1K (standard), 2K (high definition), and 4K (ultra high definition). Each resolution tier offers different credit pricing, with 4K providing the highest detail for professional applications.

items.title: How many images can I generate at once?
items.description: Seedream 4.5 supports batch generation of up to 15 images in a single request, making it efficient for exploring variations or creating image sets for your projects.

items.title: What aspect ratios are supported?
items.description: Seedream 4.5 supports a wide range of aspect ratios including 1:1 (square), 3:4, 4:3, 9:16 (portrait), 16:9 (landscape), 2:3, 3:2, and 21:9 (ultrawide cinematic), covering virtually all common use cases.
